name: Learning to Discretize: Diffusion-Based Adaptive Mesh with Spectral Guidance
summary: arXiv:2607.11974v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Most neural partial differential equation (PDE) surrogates learn how fields evolve after a grid has already been chosen. However, before any operat...
description: arXiv:2607.11974v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Most neural partial differential equation (PDE) surrogates learn how fields evolve after a grid has already been chosen. However, before any operator is applied, the grid has already determined how modeling capacity is allocated across space, resolution, and spectral bandwidth. We argue that this hidden design choice should itself be learnable,...
author: Zixuan Shen (Central South University), Bingchuan Wang (Central South University), Zhi Wang (Nanjing University), Yong Wang (Central South University)
